zh.lifeSummary: 當Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick於大約1179年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，她的父親Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland40歲，母親Alesta nic Morggán of Mar11177歲。她於1200年之前與Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1250年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick于大约1179年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德时，她的父亲Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland40岁，母亲Alesta nic Morggán of Mar11177岁。她于1200年之前与Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1250年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Avelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Norman name   Evelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick was born about 1179, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland, was 40 and her mother, Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, was 11177. She married Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick before 1200, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1250, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick est née environ 1179, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, avait 11177 ans. Elle a épousé Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick avant 1200, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1250, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.St Clair, Argyllshire, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick um 1179 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland 40 und ihre Mutter Alesta nic Morggán of Mar 11177. Sie hat vor 1200 in Scotland Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1250 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick è nata il circa 1179 nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, aveva 11177 anni. Lei sposato Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick prima del 1200, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1250, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrickが約1179年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotlandは40歳，母Alesta nic Morggán of Marは11177歳であった。1200年以前にスコットランドでDonnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1250年にフランスピカーディソンメで72歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick(이)가 대략 1179년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alesta nic Morggán of Mar(은)는 11177세였다. 그녀는 1200년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick nasceu aproximadamente 1179, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, tinha 11177 anos. Ela casou-se com Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick antes 1200, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1250, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick родилась около 1179 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alan FitzWalter 2nd High Steward of Scotland было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Alesta nic Morggán of Mar, 11177. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick перед 1200 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1250 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick antes de 1200, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1250, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
